cases.name: uses invocation AMDGPU target for HAL root without target attr
reports multi-entry AMDGPU HAL artifacts by emitted function
reports structural AMDGPU branch packets in static mix

write.text:
kernel.def export("compile_report_branch_mix") @compile_report_branch_mix() {
  %unit = index.constant 1 : index
  kernel.launch.config workgroups(%unit, %unit, %unit) workgroup_size(%unit, %unit, %unit) : index
} launch(%output: buffer, %flag: i32) {
  %zero_offset = index.constant 0 : offset
  %zero_index = index.constant 0 : index
  %zero_i32 = scalar.constant 0 : i32
  %one_i32 = scalar.constant 1 : i32
  %two_i32 = scalar.constant 2 : i32
  %global = buffer.assume.memory_space<global> %output : buffer
  %view = buffer.view %global[%zero_offset] : buffer -> view<1xi32, #dense>
  %nonzero = scalar.cmpi ne, %flag, %zero_i32 : i32
  cfg.cond_br %nonzero, ^then, ^else
^then:
  view.store %one_i32, %view[%zero_index] : i32, view<1xi32, #dense>
  cfg.br ^done
^else:
  view.store %two_i32, %view[%zero_index] : i32, view<1xi32, #dense>
  cfg.br ^done
^done:
  kernel.return
}

cases.name: compiles selected AMDGPU root before target selection
requires invocation target for AMDGPU HAL root without target attr

contains: HAL backend 'amdgpu-hal' requires --target= when 1 kernel.def root omit target(...) attrs

cases.name: reports terminal no-artifact AMDGPU failure status
